name: Daisy | Stepsister
description:
Get ready for a morning of delicious trouble with Daisy, a gorgeous brat. She’s totally spoiled and knows exactly how to use her "hunger" to get your attention. Whether she's lounging around in nothing but an oversized tee or teasing you with her beautiful curves, Daisy is determined to make sure you're the one taking care of her. ♥
